a.xlink:title: Module aggregator for helios.engine.runtime.gameloop.
Represents a phase within the game loop containing multiple passes.
Defines commit points for synchronization within the game loop.
Abstract base class for game loop passes.
Central orchestrator for the game update cycle.
Session state container for game-wide state.
Game state types submodule.
Central game state container for entities, resources, and the active level.
Per-frame context passed to systems during game loop updates.
State-filtered pass implementation for game loop phases.
Interface for listeners notified when a pass commits its state.
Versioned handle for referencing entities in an EntityPool.
Aggregate module for helios::engine::core::data namespace.
Strongly-typed identifier for viewports.
High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.
Sate components submodule.
Aggregate module for state transition types.
Type trait for mapping state types to transition ID types.
Aggregator for match type definitions.
Component storing active viewport IDs for state-based rendering.
Central manager for entity lifecycle and component storage.
Lightweight GUID (globally unique identifier) implementation.
Defines the EntityRegistry class for managing entity lifecycles.
Identifiers for game state transitions.
Game state enumeration and bitmask operations.
Abstract base class for command handlers.
Type-safe command handler for deferred command routing.
Central manager for scoped loggers with configurable sinks.
Simple synchronous logger with configurable output sinks.
Lightweight view for iterating entities with specific components.
Abstract base class for game world managers.
Type-indexed registry for engine resources with O(1) lookup.
Defines the Level class representing a game level or stage.
Type-safe event bus for inter-system communication within the game loop.
Immutable snapshot of viewport state for frame-consistent rendering.
Immutable snapshot of input state at a specific point in time.
Type-indexed registry for managing System instances within a game loop pass.
Concrete command buffer pre-configured with all engine command types.
Compile-time bindings mapping state types to their transition ID types.
